overview: Hydrolux Wellness Lounge specializes in medical weight loss and testosterone replacement therapy through personalized plans based on advanced testing and body scans. Care is provided by a Board-Certified Family Nurse Practitioner with 17+ years of clinical experience.
highlights: Board-Certified NP with 17+ years of clinical experience
Advanced lab testing and body scans
targetAudience: Busy adults struggling with weight gain, fatigue, and hormone imbalance.
